message:
Merge PR #2711: Fix idle polecat reuse when tmux session is still live

Prevents polecats with agent_state=idle but a live tmux session from
being treated as reusable. Revalidates session state under the reuse
lock and adds an integration regression test.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2711
Author: Henry-E

Co-authored-by: Henry-E <12613144+Henry-E@users.noreply.github.com>
